docket_entries.description: ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $50.00 REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT IN DURING THIRD ATTEMPT. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF STANLEY, TEAGUE VANSTORY, REBECCA AS TO DEFENDANT RHODES, DANTE CHUMPINAZ

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-17-2026 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TEAGUE STANLEY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REBECCA VANSTORY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANTE CHUMPINAZ RHODES IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,650.00 FILED BY STANLEY, TEAGUE VANSTORY, REBECCA AS TO DEFENDANT RHODES, DANTE CHUMPINAZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
